vault_sync.commit_message: vault: 2026-07-21 EOD sync — full day consolidated
vault_sync.note: Tuesday Jul 21 EOD sync complete. Build Hour (War Room deal pipeline, 8 deals, $295K weighted), Research Hour (China market + agent automation), EOD log written. All blockers unchanged. China B2B outreach still queued for Tumelo.

summary: Tuesday Jul 21 EOD — Build Hour deployed War Room China pipeline (8 deals, $295K weighted). Research Hour confirmed China market open + Blotato/Make.com for Naledi. EOD log complete. Shopify/Meta/Orgo VM blockers all unresolved. Luckin + Tim Hortons emails queued. CIIE booth deadline Aug 31.
